name: Circular Orbit Speed Calculator
description: Calculate the orbital speed for a circular orbit at a given altitude.
formulaDescription: Circular orbit speed at altitude is derived from the gravitational parameter and orbital radius.

example.explanation: A 200 km circular orbit around Earth requires a speed of roughly 7.73 km/s.

faqs.question: Why use radius + altitude?
faqs.answer: Orbit radius is the distance from the center of the body, which is the body radius plus orbital altitude.
